architecture.summary: A semantic representation framework for robot manipulation that integrates a multi-layer knowledge-representation model with a graph convolutional neural network-based knowledge graph embedding method. The system extracts manipulation knowledge from multiple information sources, embeds entities and relations from the knowledge base using GCN, and uses the resulting embeddings to predict action sequences that guide task planning and object-oriented transfer in real-world environments.
trained_components: graph convolutional neural network for knowledge graph embedding

biblio.title: Semantic Representation of Robot Manipulation with Knowledge Graph

claims.statement: A knowledge-graph-embedding method based on graph convolutional neural networks provides high-precision predictions of factors in manipulation tasks

Through the prediction of action sequences via the embedding method, robots in real-world environments can be effectively guided by the knowledge framework to complete task planning and object-oriented transfer

The framework includes a multi-layer knowledge-representation model and a multi-module knowledge-representation system that properly parse factors (scenes, objects, actions) and interpret intentions according to human cognition and semantics
